rows.label: qev041802_MSG0001
rows.name:
...A request from Ngogo? If that is the case,
I want you to talk to Potepote, mo. He is
technically the leader of this caravan, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041802_MSG0002
rows.name:
I have suffered all sorts of harassment from the
Elder, but... I suppose I can at least give him a
beautiful send-off for his final moments, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041802_MSG0003
rows.name:
As long as I have Hellfire Gates and
Autiga Powder, I can launch a massive
Nopon firework for you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041802_MSG0004
rows.name:
Phew... Being freed from Potepote
for the first time in a while feels
incredibly refreshing, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041802_MSG0005
rows.name:
Please leave the fireworks to
me, mo. We will show you a
spectacular Nopon firework, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041802_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ugh... the Elder immediately touched my rear end, mo. If
he is going to keep talking about wanting to disappear, I
wish he would just hurry up and disappear already, mo.[ST:wait ]
